---
title: "Zachary M. Moore"
output: html_document
---
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="images/site_logo_white.png" />

<style type="text/css">
.title {
  display: none;
}

#getting-started img {
  margin-right: 10px}

</style>

<div class="row" style="padding-top: 30px;">
</div>
<div class="col-sm-6">

# **Zachary M. Moore**

I am an ecologist and data scientist specializing in biological conservation, ecological restoration, and data management. Currently, I am working to identify areas that are disproportionately important for biodiversity conservation in Canada through my [work on the Key Biodiversity Areas Project](https://kbacanada.org/) with [Wildlife Conservation Society Canada](https://www.wcs.org/). I also teach courses across several programs in environment and business at [Niagara College Canada](https://www.niagaracollege.ca/). I additionally take on data consulting work here or there for specific and interesting projects, so please get in touch if you'd like to work together. 

## My Specialities
- Study Design, Implementation, and Reporting
- Ecological Monitoring, Mapping, and Assessment
- Ecological Restoration Implementation and Assessment
- Data Analysis Using R Statistical Programming and Geographic Information Systems (GIS)
- Database Design 
- Technical Reporting
- Non-profit Governance and Administration
- Post-secondary Education
- Outdoor Education and Outreach

</div>
<div class="col-sm-6">

![](media/site_headshot.png)
</a>
</div>
<div class="row" style="padding-top: 30px;">
```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 10}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

skills<-na.omit(read_excel("cv_zmm.xlsx",sheet="Skills")[1:5]) %>%
  mutate(`Self-identified Level`=factor(`Self-identified Level`,levels=c("Learning","Intermediate","Advanced","Expert","Instructor"))) 

ggplot(skills,aes(x=reorder(Skill,`Years of Professional Exposure`),y=`Years of Professional Exposure`,fill=`Self-identified Level`))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+
  facet_wrap(~Category, ncol= 1, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y",strip.position = "left") +
  scale_y_continuous(position = "right", sec.axis = dup_axis()) +
  coord_flip() + theme_classic() + 
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("Learning"="#d9d9d9","Intermediate"="#B7DFA3","Advanced"="#86BD73","Expert"="#5F9A4A","Instructor"="#2F5F20")) +
  theme(
   strip.placement = "outside",
   strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
   legend.position = "top",
   legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )
```
</div>
<div class="row" style="padding-left: 30px; padding-right: 30px; text-align: center;">

<i>Some of my most prominent technical skills with the number of years since I started doing them professionally, color-coded by my self-identified proficiency. 'Instructor' indicates skills which I teach at the post-secondary level.</i>

</div>
<div class="header">

Last Updated: 
```{r,results="asis",echo=F} 

cat(format(Sys.time(),"%c"))
```
[GitHub Source](https://github.com/zacharymilosmoore/zacharymilosmoore.github.io)
</div>
